---
title: "Hoeller Lab"
subtitle: "One sentence on what the lab studies — edit me in `index.qmd`"
---

Welcome to the Hoeller Lab. We study **[your topic here]** — replace this
paragraph with two or three sentences that tell a visitor what questions the
lab works on and why they matter.

[Our research](research.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} [Join the lab](join.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## News

- **July 2026** — Lab website launched. *(Replace these bullets with real news,
  or ask for a proper dated news/blog section later.)*
